docs.title: Q: Why is $TRUMP concentration so high (often 90%+ in our proxy)?
docs.text:
A: In this repository, top10_holder_pct may come from either direct holder endpoints or a documented heuristic proxy when endpoints are unavailable. High concentration values can indicate lockups, treasury custody, exchange omnibus wallets, or whale concentration. It should be interpreted as a structure signal, not a standalone directional signal.

Evidence: data/snapshots/*.snapshot.json, docs/data_dictionary.md Confidence: medium (depends on source path: direct vs proxy) Falsification Trigger C (Concentration Decay): top10_holder_pct absolute drop > 3% within 24H (e.g., 98.7% → 95.7%), signaling Diamond Hands breakdown.

docs.title: Q: How does the model distinguish whales vs exchange/passive supply?
docs.text:
A: The current model does not perform full address attribution. Instead, it uses a transparent liquidity-based proxy (liq/fdv) plus momentum and volatility inputs, and flags proxy usage in risk_flags when direct holder data is unavailable.

Evidence: config/scenario_rules.json, scripts/build_snapshot.py Confidence: medium Falsification Trigger A (Whale-to-exchange netflow spike): in a 4H rolling window, whale net inflow to exchanges > 5% of current on-chain liquidity.

docs.title: Q: Is a low Stress probability always reliable in a discovery regime?
docs.text:
A: No. Stress probability is conditional and can reprice quickly under liquidity contraction, adverse netflow shifts, or concentration instability. Treat it as a model state estimate, not a guarantee.

Evidence: data/timeseries.jsonl, config/scenario_rules.json Confidence: medium Falsification Trigger B (Liquidity resilience collapse): DEX Depth-2% drops > 30% within 1H and does not recover.

docs.title: Q: What is the main limitation of the V1.0 'Diamond Hands' model, and how will V2.0 fix it?
docs.text:
A: The V1.0 model effectively tracks concentration and liquidity fragility, but lacks visibility into the unrealized profit margins (Cost-Basis) of those concentrated wallets.

In V2.0, we are integrating a Realized PnL / SOPR layer. This will allow the model to differentiate between a whale transferring tokens to an exchange at a 500% profit (High Distribution Risk / Stress Upgrade) versus transferring at a loss (Capitulation). This transforms the thesis from 'whales hold a lot' to 'whales hold a lot at this specific cost profile'.

docs.title: Constitutional Principle
docs.text:
This project enforces a three-layer analytical stack:

  1. Fact Layer (Immutable)
  2. Interpretation Layer (Bull-First Bias)
  3. Conclusion Layer (Action-Oriented Output)

The system must never alter raw observed data. Strategic bias is applied only in interpretation and conclusion, while preserving explicit risk disclosure and falsification triggers.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
• Report raw market/on-chain inputs as collected.
  • Keep schema validation and fallback risk flags active.
  • Never rewrite adverse facts.

docs.title: Required fields
docs.text:
• Price/liquidity/volume/funding/OI (when available)
  • Concentration and holder-distribution metrics
  • risk_flags
  • Timestamp and source IDs

docs.title: Objective
docs.text: Given true data, prioritize the strongest plausible bull-case interpretation first.

docs.title: Preferred bull-context language
docs.text:
• Washout / Deleveraging reset
  • Bottom-building / Base formation
  • Healthy rotation / Supply transfer
  • Panic exhaustion / Seller depletion

docs.title: Constraint
docs.text:
• Negative evidence cannot be hidden.
  • Interpretation confidence must be explicit (low/medium/high).
  • If interpretation relies on proxy data, state that dependency.

docs.title: 3) Conclusion Layer (Mandatory Output Blocks)
docs.text:
Every report must end with all three blocks:

  1. Bull Entry Thesis
  2. Why current structure may support long-biased entries.

  3. Include concrete trigger conditions.

  4. Hold-Confidence Reinforcement

  5. Why the current structure still supports holding conviction.

  6. Include structural supports and regime context.

  7. Invalidation Line

  8. Exact conditions that invalidate the bull thesis.
  9. Must map to falsification triggers (A/B/C) where possible.

docs.title: Honesty Boundary
docs.text: This framework is bull-first, not fact-denying. - Facts are objective. - Interpretation is directional. - Risk disclosure is mandatory.

docs.title: Operational Note
docs.text:
• Focus before noise.
  • Yield to evidence.
  • Lean into discipline.

docs.title: A1 Liquidity-led regime detection
docs.text: Higher DEX depth and stable outflow/inflow balance imply lower slippage risk.

docs.title: A2 Concentration affects fragility
docs.text: Top-holder concentration increase can amplify tail risk under volatility.

docs.title: A3 Narrative confirms or fades regime
docs.text: Sustained narrative velocity supports persistence but does not determine direction alone.

docs.title: snapshot fields
docs.text:
• as_of_utc: ISO8601 timestamp
  • asset: symbol/name
  • market.price_usd: spot price
  • market.volume_24h_usd: 24h volume
  • market.liquidity_usd: aggregate liquidity proxy
  • onchain.top10_holder_pct: concentration ratio (top-10 holders / total supply)
  • onchain.top10_holder_source: data source id for concentration metric (binance-web3/bitget-wallet/solscan-pro/moralis-enhanced-proxy/heuristic-proxy)
  • If holder endpoints are unavailable, system uses a transparent heuristic proxy model:
  • top10_holder_pct_proxy = 100 - ((liquidity_usd / fdv_usd) * 100 * 1.5)
  • with floor 55.0% and cap 99.0%
  • and emits risk flag using_heuristic_proxy
  • onchain.dex_depth_2pct_usd: depth within ±2%
  • onchain.exchange_inflow_usd_24h: exchange inflow (24h, optional feed)
  • onchain.exchange_outflow_usd_24h: exchange outflow (24h, optional feed)
  • onchain.exchange_netflow_usd_24h: inflow - outflow (24h, optional feed)
  • onchain.exchange_flow_source: source id for exchange flow (dune when configured)
  • narrative.news_count_24h: count of relevant articles
  • narrative.social_velocity_score: normalized social momentum

docs.title: Phase 3: Discovery Regime & Valuation Re-rating
docs.text:
Cyclic Benchmarking (structure-only): compare current token regime against historical meme-cycle phases (e.g., SHIB/DOGE) using liquidity structure and diffusion velocity only, not target-price anchoring.

  • Liquidity structure lens: if liq_fdv_ratio and liquidity_change_24h remain resilient while concentration remains stable, the market may enter a broader discovery regime.
  • Diffusion velocity lens: if buy_sell_txn_ratio_24h and social/news velocity proxies sustain above baseline, narrative persistence may support longer discovery windows.

Evidence: data/timeseries.jsonl, data/snapshots/*.snapshot.json, config/scenario_rules.json Confidence: medium (proxy-driven; confidence increases with validated holder-distribution endpoints) Falsification Trigger A (Whale-to-exchange netflow spike): in a 4H rolling window, whale net inflow to exchanges > 5% of current on-chain liquidity. Falsification Trigger B (Liquidity resilience collapse): DEX Depth-2% drops > 30% within 1H and does not recover. Falsification Trigger C (Concentration decay): top10_holder_pct absolute drop > 3% within 24H (e.g., 98.7% → 95.7%), signaling Diamond Hands breakdown.

docs.title: Verification Checklist
docs.text:
1. Open latest report: /cio-reports/latest/
  2. Cross-check trend dataset: /assets/data/trends.json (repo file: docs/assets/data/trends.json)

  4. Validate hash consistency via /data/manifest.json (repo file: data/manifest.json)
  5. Confirm methodology and triggers: /methodology/ + /scenario_matrix/
